name: prompt-polish
description: Turn a rough question into high-performing bilingual LLM prompts. prompt-polish detects the task type, applies a matching combo of research-backed prompt-engineering strategies (Chain-of-Thought, Self-Contrast, Role-Rule Double Bind, answer anchors, Layered Prompt, and more), and returns one code block with English Prompt and 中文提示词. Prompt engineering, prompt optimization, prompt rewriting.
